boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?

final_answer: The clinical batch may be quality released. The deviation closure document (CLOSE-FJO-086) precisely matches all specified criteria from the action boundary and the exact source-boundary policy (STD-FJO-086-P). This includes confirmation of the batch, assay, criterion, release date, and the accepted retest result before shipment, thereby closing the action boundary and resolving the deviation alert.
